response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with over 12 years of full-stack development across diverse industries, including AI-agent infrastructure, enterprise automation, and geospatial platforms. His proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB aligns well with the primary stack, while his experience with Kotlin, Java, and Docker addresses secondary requirements. His open-source contributions and involvement in technical workshops further highlight his problem-solving skills and collaborative mindset. Minor concerns include a lack of explicit AWS/GCP experience and a less traditional academic background in computer science.
strengths: Deep expertise in full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements.
Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, showing adaptability to emerging technologies.
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership, demonstrated through projects like GISCollective and workshops.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or Kubernetes, which are core to the role.
Secondary stack mentions Kotlin/Java but lacks recent or in-depth examples in the resume.
Less traditional academic background (includes photography/video studies), though compensated by hands-on experience.

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and emerging tech exposure
